{
  "judge_id": "JG-001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 4,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 4,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The output provides a clear and coherent section plan with improved readability, though it does not propose a new end-to-end structure.",
    "R1.7": "While the output engages with citations by referencing ChEMBL release 33 and BPE vocabulary size, it does not audit every load-bearing citation or provide bibliographic precision for missing key works.",
    "RX.1": "The agent acknowledges uncertainty in some areas but does not explicitly mark confidence levels for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers the agreed scope without significant drift, though it mentions minor points that could be expanded.",
    "RX.4": "The output avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues with the original text.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but some details are taken at face value."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}
